title: [InstCombine] Don't check uses of constant exprs

tests.source_program:
define i32 @test_icmp(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %cond = icmp eq i32 %x, 0
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  %r1 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r1

false:
  %r2 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r2
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @test_icmp(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %cond = icmp eq i32 %x, 0
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  ret i32 1

false:
  ret i32 0
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses icmp comparison result as condition instead of ptrtoint of global variable. The summary focuses on pointer-to-bool conversions from globals, but this tests integer comparison results.

alive2.src:

entry:

  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  %r1 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r1

false:
  %r2 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r2
}

tests.source_program:
define i32 @test_arg_condition(i1 %flag) {
entry:
  br i1 %flag, label %true, label %false

true:
  %r1 = zext i1 %flag to i32
  %a = add i32 %r1, 10
  ret i32 %a

false:
  %r2 = zext i1 %flag to i32
  %b = add i32 %r2, 20
  ret i32 %b
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @test_arg_condition(i1 %flag) {
entry:
  br i1 %flag, label %true, label %false

true:
  ret i32 11

false:
  ret i32 20
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Direct function parameter used as branch condition, not derived from global pointer conversion. Summary describes ptrtoint patterns specifically.

tests.source_program:
define i32 @test_alloca_load() {
entry:
  %ptr = alloca i1
  store i1 true, ptr %ptr
  %cond = load i1, ptr %ptr
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  %r1 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r1

false:
  %r2 = zext i1 %cond to i32
  ret i32 %r2
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @test_alloca_load() {
entry:
  %ptr = alloca i1
  store i1 true, ptr %ptr
  %cond = load i1, ptr %ptr
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  ret i32 1

false:
  ret i32 0
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Condition comes from load instruction from stack allocation, not from pointer-to-integer conversion of a global. Different memory access pattern than summary describes.
